tokens: We've got an extension here, and you've got about 25 minutes (remaining).

tokens: Let's go back to the Rover.

tokens: We think that sounds like a great plan.

tokens: Well, we need the shovel for that.

tokens: Yeah, we can reach in there if...(Looking at the shadow area under House Rock) I see what you mean.

tokens: It's all salted with that one white rock there.

tokens: Hang onto this, for a second.

tokens: Try an "after" of that, John, and I'll get the soil sample.

tokens: Man, it's hard under there, you know it?

tokens: Tony, there must be a big rock right under here.

tokens: I can't get the rake in, but that's just...

tokens: I know, it's all white under here, isn't it?

tokens: Yeah, I think it might be a rock surface and it's one of those friable ones, the fractured ones, and we're just chipping off (fragments)...Here, John, I can get a soil sample from where you kicked it up with your foot.

tokens: That soil sample is going in bag...(Pause)

tokens: (Responding to Tony as he turns toward House Rock) Okay.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Pause) Okay, Tony; my guess is that most of these rocks around here are extremely shocked.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: All these in this area look the same.
Hope that thing is not coming off.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: In the sunlight, Houston, this white rock has sort of a greenish hue to it, this white rock breccia.

I would reckon that, if we could see to the bottom (of North Ray), we could say for sure if this big black rock is right out of the bottom.
But my guess, from the old (pre-mission) photographs, it probably is.

tokens: That sounds like a good guess.

tokens: No, right here on this one.

tokens: No, I bet you it's not.

tokens: (Pause) If you come back here in two weeks, and...(rethinking about where the Sun will be in two weeks) it'll be dark!

tokens: Okay, Tony, this is a very blocky area here.

tokens: (Pause) We don't see any glass, though, particularly.

tokens: Well, Tony, that's your "house rock" right there.

tokens: Charlie, don't get too near the edge of that thing, it falls off.

tokens: Can we whack with the...(Pause) See, look at that.

tokens: There are two rock types here, Tony: that white matrix one, and then the black...the one with the black that...

tokens: But there are very few of those.
